creator: adamk@voicenet.com
text:
The problem still exists even after manually installing libXrender from
the git source repository.

At the moment, this is a huge bug (at least for me) as X is pretty
useless if nearly every application is crashing the server.

I have noticed that my original thoughts about the crash happening from
any application linking to libXrender is incorrect.  xterm is linked to
libXrender, but doesn't crash the X server.  Does xterm actually make
use of the RENDER extension, though?  

Adam
